03 — Process

Edit with precision

A straightforward path from raw footage to polished short-form content.

01

Send a Raw Clip

Share unedited footage and a brief on what you need.

02

Review the Style

We align on pacing, tone, and the look you want.

03

Receive a Sample Edit

See the editing approach applied to your content — free.

04

Collaborate

If it fits, we move forward on your ongoing content needs.
